histogram.name: PrivateAi.Client.FeatureName
histogram.summary: Records the Private AI feature name for each request sent. Recorded for every request.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.Client.RequestErrorCode
histogram.summary: Records the client-side errors that occur during the request lifecycle. Recorded for every failed request.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.Client.RequestLatency.{Status}
histogram.summary: Records the latency of a request sent from the Private AI Client. This is the time from when the request is sent to when the response is received or the request times out. Recorded for every request. The suffix on the histogram name indicates the outcome: {Status}

variant.name: Error
variant.summary: The request failed with an error.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.Client.RequestSize
histogram.summary: Records the size of the request payload sent from the Private AI Client. Recorded for every request.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.Client.ResponseSize.Success
histogram.summary: Records the size of the response payload received by the Private AI Client for successful requests. Recorded for every successful request.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.Client.ServerErrorCode
histogram.summary: Records the server-side errors that occur during the request lifecycle. Recorded for every failed request due to a server error. The error codes are based on the canonical Google RPC codes. See components/private_ai/proto/google_rpc_code.proto for the enum values.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.Client.WebSocketCloseCode
histogram.summary: Records the WebSocket close code when the connection is dropped. This helps diagnose connection issues. See RFC 6455, Section 7.4.1 for a list of defined status codes. Recorded every time the WebSocket channel is dropped.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.OakSessionSandboxStability.{CallName}
histogram.summary: Records the stability of the {CallName} from SecureSessionAsyncImpl to the Oak Session service sandbox. True for success, false for failure.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.Phosphor.ConfigHttp.RequestLatency
histogram.summary: Records the latency of HTTP requests made by the client to the Phosphor server.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.Phosphor.ConfigHttp.ResponseCode
histogram.summary: Records the HTTP response code received from Phosphor server. 0 indicates a network error or no response.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.Phosphor.FeatureTokenManager.ServedFromCache
histogram.summary: Records whether a requested auth token was served from the local cache (true) or required a fetch (false).

histogram.name: PrivateAi.Phosphor.FeatureTokenManager.TokensFetched
histogram.summary: Records the number of tokens successfully fetched in a batch by FeatureTokenManager.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.Phosphor.TokenFetcher.GetAuthnTokens.Result
histogram.summary: Records the result of the GetAuthnTokens operation in TokenFetcher.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.Phosphor.TokenFetcher.OAuthTokenFetchLatency
histogram.summary: Records the latency of fetching the OAuth token required for BSA.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.SecureChannel.GetAttestationRequestLatency.{Status}
histogram.summary: Records the latency of getting the attestation request. This may involve server requests to get a blinded token. The suffix indicates the outcome: {Status}.

variant.name: Success
variant.summary: Getting the attestation request was successful.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.SecureChannel.GetHandshakeMessageLatency.{Status}
histogram.summary: Records the latency of getting the handshake message. The suffix indicates the outcome: {Status}.

variant.name: Success
variant.summary: Getting the handshake message was successful.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.SecureChannel.RequestsPerSession
histogram.summary: Records the number of requests sent in a single secure channel session. Recorded when a session is closed.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.SecureChannel.SendAttestationRequestLatency.{Status}
histogram.summary: Records the latency of sending the attestation request and receiving a response. This is the time from when the attestation request is sent to when the response is received and verified. The suffix indicates the outcome: {Status}.

variant.name: Error
variant.summary: The attestation request failed with an error.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.SecureChannel.SendHandshakeRequestLatency.{Status}
histogram.summary: Records the latency of sending the handshake request and receiving a response. This is the time from when the handshake request is sent to when the response is received and verified. The suffix indicates the outcome: {Status}.

variant.name: Error
variant.summary: The handshake request failed with an error.

histogram.name: PrivateAi.SecureChannel.SessionDuration
histogram.summary: Records the duration of a secure channel session. This is the time from when the session is established to when it is closed. Recorded when a session is closed.
